name: Turkey Cutlets Milanaise
recipeIngredient: OR Other firm white bread, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the bread cubes in a food processor with a knife blade until fine crumbs.
Spread the crumbs on an ungreased baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 7 minutes,
or until lightly browned.
2. Combine 1 cup of bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese in a shallow bowl; set aside.
Reserve the remaining crumbs for another use.
3. Combine the egg and egg white in a shallow bowl; set aside.
4. Pound each turkey cutlet to 1/4 inch thickness.
5. Sift flour over both sides of the cutlets.
6. Dip the cutlets in the egg mixture, then dredge in the breadcrumb mixture.
7. Place the cutlets on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
8. Bake at 450°F for 8 minutes. Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve with lemon slices.
(Fat: 6.1g; Cholesterol: 131mg.)
